---
name: Efficiency Opportunity
about: Agent-reported workflow friction or efficiency improvement
title: "Efficiency: [brief blocker description]"
labels: ["efficiency-opportunity", "agent-feedback"]
---

## Efficiency Opportunity

**Role**: [Role name, e.g., "HR and AI Agent Specialist"]  
**Blocker Type**: [One of: Authentication, Tool/Command, Permission, Knowledge, Timing, Process]  
**Severity**: [One of: Blocker, High, Medium, Low]  
**Discovered**: [Date and workflow context]

## Problem
[Clear description of the friction encountered. What was the agent trying to do? Where did it fail?]

## Impact
- [Specific consequence 1]
- [Specific consequence 2]
- [How this affects workflow efficiency or quality]

## Suggested Fix
[Concrete proposal for resolution. Examples:
- Install/add tool X to container
- Create helper script at [location]
- Document Y in agent instructions
- Adjust permission/config at [location]
- Add pre-check logic before operation Z
]

## Workaround Used
[How the agent worked around this issue to complete the task]

---

## Notes for a-HRAIAS

Check this section if suggesting cross-role improvements or noting patterns:

**Cross-role applicability**: [Does this affect other roles? Yes/No]  
**Related issues**: [Link to other efficiency-opportunity issues if this is a pattern]  
**Suggested action**: [Where should fix be implemented? Context-Engineering vs role-specific vs container image]

---

**For agents**: When filing, rank blockers by severity and fill all sections so a-HRAIAS can prioritize and act quickly.
